context: A man enjoys a simple bicycle ride through a green park framed by modern city buildings.

actions.description: The cyclist enters the winding park path, framed by flowers and tall trees.
He pedals confidently as the wooden basket bounces lightly with the path texture.
Modern buildings appear through the trees as he continues into the calm park scene.
